'''鈭歴h-z-t''' ('''shazata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:practicalize|practicalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:practicalize|practicalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-z-t
|-
! Lemma
| shazata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazatithi|shazatithi]] || [[word:shazatiji|shazatiji]] || [[word:shazatishi|shazatishi]] || [[word:shazati|shazati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazatuthuth|shazatuthuth]] || [[word:shazatujuj|shazatujuj]] || [[word:shazatushush|shazatushush]] || [[word:shazat|shazat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazatuthu|shazatuthu]] || [[word:shazatuju|shazatuju]] || [[word:shazatushu|shazatushu]] || [[word:shazatu|shazatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazatufuth|shazatufuth]] || [[word:shazatufuj|shazatufuj]] || [[word:shazatufush|shazatufush]] || [[word:shazatuf|shazatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazatethe|shazatethe]] || [[word:shazateje|shazateje]] || [[word:shazateshe|shazateshe]] || [[word:shazate|shazate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazatothoth|shazatothoth]] || [[word:shazatojoj|shazatojoj]] || [[word:shazatoshosh|shazatoshosh]] || [[word:shazat|shazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazatotho|shazatotho]] || [[word:shazatojo|shazatojo]] || [[word:shazatosho|shazatosho]] || [[word:shazato|shazato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazatofoth|shazatofoth]] || [[word:shazatofoj|shazatofoj]] || [[word:shazatofosh|shazatofosh]] || [[word:shazatof|shazatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazat忙th忙|shazat忙th忙]] || [[word:shazat忙j忙|shazat忙j忙]] || [[word:shazat忙sh忙|shazat忙sh忙]] || [[word:shazat忙|shazat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazatathath|shazatathath]] || [[word:shazatajaj|shazatajaj]] || [[word:shazatashash|shazatashash]] || [[word:shazat|shazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazatatha|shazatatha]] || [[word:shazataja|shazataja]] || [[word:shazatasha|shazatasha]] || [[word:shazata|shazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazatafath|shazatafath]] || [[word:shazatafaj|shazatafaj]] || [[word:shazatafash|shazatafash]] || [[word:shazataf|shazataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shazatasha|shazatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazatasha|goshazatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazatasha|gokishazatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shazatn眉sha|shazatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazatnkn眉sha|goshazatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatn眉sha|gokishazatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazatsh毛sha|shazatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazatnksh毛sha|goshazatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazatsh毛sha|gokishazatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatrosha|shazatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatnkrosha|goshazatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatrosha|gokishazatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatmusha|shazatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatnkmusha|goshazatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatmusha|gokishazatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazatsherasha|shazatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazatnksherasha|goshazatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazatsherasha|gokishazatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazatngasha|shazatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazatnkngasha|goshazatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazatngasha|gokishazatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazatyasha|shazatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazatnkyasha|goshazatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazatyasha|gokishazatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazatyamasha|shazatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazatnkyamasha|goshazatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazatyamasha|gokishazatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatn眉sh毛sha|shazatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatnkn眉sh毛sha|goshazatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatn眉sh毛sha|gokishazatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatn眉rosha|shazatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatnkn眉rosha|goshazatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatn眉rosha|gokishazatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatn眉musha|shazatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatnkn眉musha|goshazatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatn眉musha|gokishazatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatsh毛n眉sha|shazatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatnksh毛n眉sha|goshazatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatsh毛n眉sha|gokishazatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatsh毛rosha|shazatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatnksh毛rosha|goshazatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatsh毛rosha|gokishazatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatsh毛musha|shazatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatnksh毛musha|goshazatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatsh毛musha|gokishazatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatron眉sha|shazatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatnkron眉sha|goshazatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatron眉sha|gokishazatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatrosh毛sha|shazatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatnkrosh毛sha|goshazatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatrosh毛sha|gokishazatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatromusha|shazatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatnkromusha|goshazatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatromusha|gokishazatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatmun眉sha|shazatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatnkmun眉sha|goshazatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatmun眉sha|gokishazatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatmush毛sha|shazatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatnkmush毛sha|goshazatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatmush毛sha|gokishazatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatmurosha|shazatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatnkmurosha|goshazatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatmurosha|gokishazatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shazat|shazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙z忙t|sh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshazat|hoshazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙z忙t|hosh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshazat|hohoshazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙z忙t|hohosh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shazat|n眉shazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙z忙t|n眉sh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shazat|n眉n眉shazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙z忙t|n眉n眉sh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shazat|n茂shazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙z忙t|n茂sh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shazat|n茂n茂shazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙z忙t|n茂n茂sh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushazat|lushazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙z忙t|lush忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushazat|lulushazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙z忙t|lulush忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishazat|lishazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙z忙t|lish忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishazat|lilishazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙z忙t|lilish忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshazat|koshazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙z忙t|kosh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshazat|kokoshazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙z忙t|kokosh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshazat|keshazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙z忙t|kesh忙z忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshazat|kekeshazat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙z忙t|kekesh忙z忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
